title: hedlundia velebitica
intro: Hedlundia velebitica, also known as the Balkan hedlundia, is a rare and endemic plant species found in the Velebit Mountains of Croatia. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and is characterized by its small, yellow flowers. Hedlundia velebitica is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The plant is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall health and well-being, and to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues and digestive problems.
